context.environment: 200-user enterprise with Admin, Operations, IT, and Guest VLANs. Cloud-hosted portal.
symptoms: Users in the Operations VLAN report intermittent inability to access the cloud portal.
Some DNS queries appear to fail during peak hours.

interpretationTips: Separate addressing issues from DNS resolution failures.
Look for differences between VLAN behavior.
commonMisconceptions: Assuming DNS failure always indicates external outage.
Confusing packet loss with application-layer failure.

artifacts.label: Ping from OPS-01 to Cloud Portal
artifacts.explanation: ICMP RTT and packet loss from Operations VLAN host to cloud portal endpoint.
interpretationTips: Note whether packet loss is sustained or intermittent.
Compare RTT stability before and during loss.

artifacts.label: Edge Firewall Log Excerpts
artifacts.explanation: Selected firewall entries from the edge device.
interpretationTips: Examine destination ports and VLAN source addresses.
